main.content:
{{Infobox Spell|List={{{1|}}}|GetValue={{{GetValue|}}}
| name          = Light Healing
| spellid       = 1
| type          = Instant
| subclass      = Healing
| words         = exura
| premium       = no
| mana          = 20
| basepower     = 40
| levelrequired = 8
| cooldown      = 1
| cooldowngroup = 1
| voc           = [[Paladin]]s, [[Druid]]s, [[Sorcerer]]s, [[Monk]]s
| effect        = Restores a small amount of [[HP|health]] and cures [[paralysis]].
| notes         = A rather weak, but popular and efficient healing spell. Cast by a high level mage, it has about 25% of the power of [[Ultimate Healing]]. 
| history       = * It was the only healing spell available for [[knight]]s for many years until [[Wound Cleansing]] was introduced in the [[Winter Update 2007]].
* Knights can not use it since the [[Winter Update 2010]].
* Learning Light Healing used to cost 170 [[gp]], but since the [[Winter Update 2012]], it is free.
| libraryname        = lighthealing
| librarytext        = This spell is awarded free to all newly chosen paladins, druids, sorcerers and monks. Although its salutary effect is limited, its development represented a major breakthrough in spell research. For the first time, adventurers could quickly heal their own wounds and injuries, significantly increasing their chances to survive the dangers they are daily confronted with. Even today, Light Healing is still a very popular spell because of its reasonable mana cost.
}}

:''This article is about the item called Great Fireball Rune. For the spell to create them, see [[Great Fireball]].'' {{Infobox Object|List={{{1|}}}|GetValue={{{GetValue|}}} | name = Great Fireball Rune | article = a | actualname = great fireball rune | plural = ? | itemid = 3191 | objectclass = Runes | primarytype = Attack Runes | secondarytype = Area Runes | words = adori mas flam | implemented = 7.6 | lightradius = 1 | lightcolor = 215 | immobile = no | walkable = yes | pickupable = yes | usable = yes | levelrequired = 30 | vocrequired = monks, druids, sorcerers, paladins, knights | mlrequired = 4 | damagetype = Fire | weight = 0.52 | stackable = yes | marketable = yes | droppedby = {{Dropped By|}} | value = | storevalue = {{Store Trades|{{Store Product|12|amount=250}}}} | npcvalue = 0 | npcprice = 64 | buyfrom = Asima, Chartan, Chuckles, Fenech, Frans, Frederik, Ghorza, Gnomegica, Khanna, Mordecai, Nelly, Onfroi, Rabaz, Rachel, Rock In A Hard Place, Romir, Shiriel, Siflind, Sigurd, Talila, Tandros, Topsy, Valindara, Xodet | sellto = -- | basepower = 50 | notes = [[File:Burned Icon.gif]] Shoots a large circular flame attack based on the center of the selected area, this is the [[Sorcerer]]s' equivalent of the [[Avalanche]].
This rune is really useful to get rid of big groups of monsters when the character gets surrounded or when you need to clear a room. It once was available to make at level 23, however this was changed in an update.
For the spell, see [[Great Fireball]]. | history = The sprite produced by a [[Great Fireball Rune]] changed in the [[Updates/8.1|2007 Winter Update]]. It used to look like this:
[[File:Great fireball1.gif]] The price was changed from 57 to 64 since [[Summer Update 2024]]. }}
